description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine printdiagfile_2, and is implemented by a call to printdiagfile_2. Use this API to print the active Slider diagram in the GUI. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. printdiagfile(sdev, copies, orient)

parameters.name: sdev
parameters.description: Name of valid attached windows printer. (input).
